title: Obtain representative samples in accordance with sampling plan
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Obtain representative samples in accordance with sampling plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for sampling

pcs.text: Confirm the sampling location, number and type of samples, and timing and frequency of sampling from workplace or client’s sampling plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the sampling location, number and type of samples, and timing and frequency of sampling from workplace or client’s sampling plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the sampling location, number and type of samples, and timing and frequency of sampling from workplace or client’s sampling plan.

pcs.text: Liaise with relevant personnel to arrange site access and all necessary clearances and/or permits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with relevant personnel to arrange site access and all necessary clearances and/or permits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with relevant personnel to arrange site access and all necessary clearances and/or permits.

pcs.text: Select sampling equipment and conditions to achieve representative samples and preserve sample integrity during collection, storage and transit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select sampling equipment and conditions to achieve representative samples and preserve sample integrity during collection, storage and transit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select sampling equipment and conditions to achieve representative samples and preserve sample integrity during collection, storage and transit.

pcs.text: Check that all procedures are in accordance with client or workplace requirements, relevant standards and codes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that all procedures are in accordance with client or workplace requirements, relevant standards and codes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that all procedures are in accordance with client or workplace requirements, relevant standards and codes.

pcs.text: Identify site and sampling hazards and review workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site and sampling hazards and review workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site and sampling hazards and review workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Assemble and check all sampling equipment, materials, containers and safety equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble and check all sampling equipment, materials, containers and safety equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble and check all sampling equipment, materials, containers and safety equipment.

pcs.text: Arrange suitable transport to, from and around site as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange suitable transport to, from and around site as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange suitable transport to, from and around site as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for sampling

elements.title: Conduct sampling and log samples

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate sampling sites?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate sampling sites.

pcs.text: Conduct representative sampling in accordance with sampling plan and workplace procedures, limiting hazard or contamination to samples, self, work area and environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct representative sampling in accordance with sampling plan and workplace procedures, limiting hazard or contamination to samples, self, work area and environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct representative sampling in accordance with sampling plan and workplace procedures, limiting hazard or contamination to samples, self, work area and environment.

pcs.text: Record all information and label samples in accordance with traceability and chain of custody requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record all information and label samples in accordance with traceability and chain of custody requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record all information and label samples in accordance with traceability and chain of custody requirements.

pcs.text: Record environment or production conditions and any atypical observations made during sampling that may impact on sample representativeness or integrity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record environment or production conditions and any atypical observations made during sampling that may impact on sample representativeness or integrity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record environment or production conditions and any atypical observations made during sampling that may impact on sample representativeness or integrity.

pcs.text: Transport all samples back to base in accordance with procedures and relevant codes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport all samples back to base in accordance with procedures and relevant codes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport all samples back to base in accordance with procedures and relevant codes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct sampling and log samples

elements.title: Address client issues

pcs.text: Ensure that information provided to client is accurate, relevant and authorised for release
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that information provided to client is accurate, relevant and authorised for release?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that information provided to client is accurate, relevant and authorised for release.

pcs.text: Maintain security and confidentiality of all client and workplace data and information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain security and confidentiality of all client and workplace data and information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain security and confidentiality of all client and workplace data and information.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Address client issues

elements.title: Maintain a safe work environment

pcs.text: Clean all equipment, containers, work area and vehicles in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean all equipment, containers, work area and vehicles in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean all equipment, containers, work area and vehicles in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check serviceability of all equipment before storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check serviceability of all equipment before storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check serviceability of all equipment before storage.

pcs.text: Use defined safe work practices and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of other personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use defined safe work practices and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of other personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use defined safe work practices and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of other personnel.

pcs.text: Minimise the generation of wastes and environmental impacts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise the generation of wastes and environmental impacts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise the generation of wastes and environmental impacts.

pcs.text: Ensure the safe collection of all hazardous wastes for appropriate disposal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure the safe collection of all hazardous wastes for appropriate disposal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure the safe collection of all hazardous wastes for appropriate disposal.
